title: eriocaulon rupestre
intro: Eriocaulon rupestre, also known as the "Rockhood", is a species of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae. This plant is native to China and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eriocaulon rupestre include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
